comment.body:
Side note for the "up or down plp":
Market is not about up or down. One can trade theta, vega or/and delta. 
My posts describe the characteristics so one can clearly set a trade, and can know what signs he should look at.
Bcs nobody knows if market will go up or down in the next sec on an intraday basis. but if we know the signs following from the characteristics, we can catch the momentums. And after we got the profit, we don't care about what happens after anymore. It is only a data for the next day to see how the momentum and the sentiment moves.
Stop thinking two-dimensionally.

Does anybody know how the market will behave right after opening? No. But we have lvls, we understand the characteristics, so we can wait the right moment patiently, and jump in when we see the signs we were waiting for. 

So tiring to explain it over and over again. And still some plp come and ask "up or down". They better unsubscribe.

comment.body:
for example, if I see call side edge, and i see a downside pressure as lets say MMs are hoarded deltas over the weekend and they need to rebalance, then I will wait for a downside lvl to give it to me.
I wait for vanna flip, or mean reversion lvl, while looking at teh gamma chart, and look at the smirk intraday how it moves... real time put/call delta etc. 
and when I see that the momentum is exhausting, I wait for the lvl and start to scale in. And if I see what I wanted to see, I go with leverage too. And boom.
If it disproves me, bcs the flows that I should see in order to hold a long call, then I just take the profit, and let the puts running that I bought as hedges.

comment.body: My understanding is that later in the session positive speed will get steeper as color decays gamma, this positive speed will lead to potentially increased upside volatility. later in the session negative charm will cause sold OTM puts (in particular) to gain delta (head towards 0)  leading to positve flow as the hedges are unwound.
